falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 55 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 55 would indicate a confirmed blowoff phase, contradicting the current HOLD signal and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above 5000 with a 3-day average volume exceeding 3.5 billion shares
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout with heavy volume would refute the HOLD signal, suggesting a confirmed uptrend rather than an unknown phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2022_may_luna reaches 92% or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant increase in pattern similarity would validate the historical bottom pattern, directly contradicting the current UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
